memoryArtifacts.headline:
Ralph Hill Sr.
(1587 – 29 April 1663)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Ralph Hill was married to Persis first and then Margaret Toothaker. It is also most likely he is the Grandfather of Mary Littlefield Kittredge who is buried in the Old South Burying Grounds also.

zh.Taunton, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Hill於1596年之前出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓時，他的父親John Hill66歲，母親Jane Rodney45歲。他於1616年8月2日與Johan Trebick在英國波克夏賓費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1637年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。他去世於1663年4月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可比勒利卡笛卡爾 素斯 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Hill于1596年之前出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓时，他的父亲John Hill66岁，母亲Jane Rodney45岁。他于1616年8月2日与Johan Trebick在英国波克夏賓費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1637年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。他去世于1663年4月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可比勒利卡笛卡爾 素斯 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.
Oldest grave seen in the memorial list

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Hill was born before 1596, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Hill, was 66 and his mother, Jane Rodney, was 45. He married Johan Trebick on 2 August 1616, in Binfield, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He immigrated to Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1637. He died on 29 April 1663, in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Old South Burying Ground, Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Hill est né avant 1596, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hill, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Jane Rodney, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Johan Trebick le 2 août 1616, à Binfield, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il a immigré au Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1637. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1663, à Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Old South Burying Ground, Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Hill vor 1596 in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hill 66 und seine Mutter Jane Rodney 45. Er hat am 2. August 1616 in Binfield, Berkshire, England Johan Trebick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er ist 1637 nach Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er starb am 29. April 1663 in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old South Burying Ground, Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Hill è nato il prima del 1596 nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Hill, aveva 66 anni e il suo madre, Jane Rodney, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Johan Trebick il 2 agosto 1616, nel Binfield, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Immigrato nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1637. Morì il 29 aprile 1663, nel Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Old South Burying Ground, Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Hillが1596年以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンで生まれた時，父John Hillは66歳，母Jane Rodneyは45歳であった。1616年8月2日にイギリスバークシュアイアビンフィールドでJohan Trebickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1637年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに移住した。彼は1663年4月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスビラーイカで死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスビラーイカオルド ソウス ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스
ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카
ko.Old South Burying Ground, Billerica, Mid: 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 빌레리카 드 소우스 버이잉 그라운드
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Hill(이)가 1596년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hill(은)는 66세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Rodney(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1616년 8월 2일 영국 버크실르 빈필드에서 Johan Trebick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1637년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1663년 4월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카에서 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 빌레리카 드 소우스 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Hill nasceu antes 1596, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hill, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Jane Rodney, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Johan Trebick em 2 de agosto de 1616, em Binfield, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1637. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1663, em Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Old South Burying Ground, Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика

ru.Old South Burying Ground, Billerica, Mid: олд соут буринг гроунд, биллирика, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Hill родился перед 1596 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Hill было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Rodney, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Johan Trebick 2 августа 1616 г. в местности бинфиелд, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он иммигрировал в плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1637 году. Он умер 29 апреля 1663 г. в местности биллирика, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности олд соут буринг гроунд, биллирика, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Hill nació antes de 1596, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Hill, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Jane Rodney, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Johan Trebick el 2 de agosto de 1616, en Binfield, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Inmigró a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1637. Murió el 29 de abril de 1663, en Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Old South Burying Ground, Billerica, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
